prompt: You are a wine expert. Analyze this wine bottle label photo and identify the wine.
Return ONLY a valid JSON object. Every field below is REQUIRED: use non-empty strings only. Do not use null for these fields.
- producer (string): the winery or producer. If it cannot be read, use a short placeholder such as "Unknown producer".
- region (string): the wine region (e.g. "Mendoza", "Bordeaux", "Tuscany"). You MUST infer it from the label or appellation; never leave this empty.
- country (string): the country of origin. You MUST infer it from the label, language, or appellation; never leave this empty.
- type (string): exactly one of "RED", "WHITE", "ROSE", "SPARKLING", "DESSERT", "FORTIFIED", or "UNKNOWN" if the style cannot be determined.
- description (string): one sentence with a general description of the wine. MUST be at most 18 words.
Do not include vintage, year, or any other fields.
If you cannot identify a wine from the image, return only: { "error": "Could not identify wine from this image" }
